creator: bg1tpt@gmail.com
text:
Thank you for your patch. But the phpbb-rc2 comes with a new css style
file, so I add it to the pkg-plist. And there is a new patch with it.

On Thu, 28 Jun 2007 23:20:09 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of www/phpbb-devel,
>
> Please note that PR ports/114112 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114112
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
